title: 2-Pack Premium Silver Ice Fountain Cake Sparklers – 12cm Indoor Safe Sparkler Candles – 30-Second Burn, Smokeless Spark Fountain for Cakes, Bottles, Birthdays & Celebrations
features: 💠 2 High-Quality Silver Ice Fountain Sparklers Refined silver exterior for a modern, polished look at upscale events.
📏 12cm Length with Built-In Spike Base Compact size with a secure spike for easy placement on cakes or displays.
⏱️ 30-Second Burn Time Perfect balance of duration and safety for memorable effects.
🎇 Bright Silver-White Spark Fountain Effect Creates a stunning shower of sparks to captivate guests.
🏠 Indoor Safe – Smokeless & Low Odor Clean-burning and safe for indoor venues, homes, and professional settings.
description: Shine Bright with Elegant Silver Ice Fountain Sparklers – 2-Pack, 12cm, 30-Second Burn Time Make every celebration shine with this 2-pack of premium silver ice fountain sparklers. These elegant silver-cased sparkler candles create a striking silver-white fountain effect, ideal for cakes, bottles, and party centerpieces. Measuring 12cm in length and offering an approximate 30-second burn time, each sparkler provides a dramatic yet safe burst of sparkle—perfect for capturing special moments. Designed for indoor use, they’re smokeless and low odor, making them ideal for restaurants, clubs, homes, and event spaces. Whether you’re celebrating a birthday, wedding, anniversary, or just want to elevate your presentation, these silver sparklers add a sleek, eye-catching finish to any occasion. ✅ Ideal For: Birthday Cakes & Desserts Champagne or Bottle Presentations Weddings, Anniversaries & Elegant Events Restaurants, Nightclubs & Private Parties VIP & Themed Celebrations
